name: Maple Caramel Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1/4 cup sugar in a saucepan until melted.
2. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, then add the 1/2 cup water and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking until the syrup can spin a thread on a spoon.
4. Gradually pour the hot syrup over the beaten egg yolks, which should be light lemon-colored.
5. Beat constantly to combine.
6. Blend together the remaining 1/4 cup sugar and flour, then stir into the mixture.
7. Add milk gradually, cooking until thickened. Stir frequently.
8. Incorporate the egg yolk mixture, continuing to cook for a few more minutes.
9. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
10. Stir in the maple flavoring and fold in the whipped cream.
11. Freeze. Makes 2 quarts.
